title: MikroTik L11UG-5HaxD
description: L11UG-5HaxD powerful Wi-Fi 6 radio with MMCX connectors enables further customization. The board is equipped with 1 gigabit LAN, USB port and Wi-Fi 6 5GHz radio. For powering device there is a DC jack or passive PoE. The maximum power consumption of the device is 12 W. Without any additional devices, the maximum power consumption is only around 6 W. routerborard comes pre-installed with RouterOS v7, License level 4 Wi-Fi 6 5GHz 802.11a/n/ac/ax USB port, 1 Gbps LAN port, DC jack Pre-installed RouterOS v7, License level 4 Device
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11ax Type of antenna Detachable Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 18 .. 28V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 12 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 28V DC Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 114 Height [mm] 27 Depth [mm] 107 Hardware CPU IPQ-5010 CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 256
